text_block_list.text:
After a day out with Nice Nature, the two of us
are walking home, when...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hey, isn't that City standing over there? I wonder
if she's in the middle of a modeling job.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Even just the way she's standing gives off
an otherworldly aura...

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, I wanna see a little more sunshine on your
face... Let's take five!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sure.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Nature. What are you up to? With your
trainer too, I see.
choice_data_list: We were just heading back ho—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Talk about breathtaking! You looked so divine,
my hands clasped together instinctively in prayer!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
My feelings go beyond admiration—it's worship! I
feel so blessed!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Haha! Can't say I've heard that one before.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
There you go, that's the smile I wanted to see!
Hey, would you two want to join the photo
shoot?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You want us to join... a photo shoot?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Um... Hold on now. I don't want to bother them.
choice_data_list:
Do you want to try? You were just going on
about how much you admire her, after all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hold on! That was just talk! I can't possibly do it!
I'm no model!
choice_data_list: You never know unless you try.
You never know unless you try.
Then I'll do it!
Then I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hold on! That was just talk! I can't possibly do it!
I'm no model!
choice_data_list: You never know unless you try.
You never know unless you try.
Then I'll do it!
Then I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Th-that might be true, but the fact that it's impossible for me is the whole reason I admire models!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...I totally understand what you're saying. They
say the first step is the hardest.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: In that case, leave it to me. I've got your back.
choice_data_list: Break a leg!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Really? Are you actually serious?! I really don't
know if I can do this!
And so, the photo shoot begins.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're even stiffer than me. Let's think
about something funny and relax.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
S-something funny?! I don’t have that kind of
mental capacity left in me!
choice_data_list:
(This sounds like a job for the master of silly
faces—me!)

text_block_list.name: Nature and City
text_block_list.text: Pffft!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! How are you even doing that?!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Amazing! That's the smile I wanted to see!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: We're finally finished...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Good work! And thanks for the help. The
photographer was really impressed.
choice_data_list: You both looked amazing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh, thanks. And you're good at flattery, as
always.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Well, I'll send you a copy once the
magazine releases. You can check how it turned
out then.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... This must be the magazine.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait, why's our photo is so big?! I don't deserve
such a huge space!
choice_data_list: Looks like you're trending online too. See?
Looks like you're trending online too. See?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No, don't show me! I don't want to see what all
the haters are—

The screen is full of comments praising Gold City
and Nice Nature's beautiful smiles... and wishing
for their success.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Th-that's enough. I get it, I get it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Siiiigh... Is it hot in here or is it me?
choice_data_list: Let's shine on the track too.
Let's shine on the track too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, yeah.

Nice Nature seems more enthusiastic than usual
at training after that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer! Let me see you strike a pose!
And so, the photo shoot begins.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So that's why you're Nature's trainer, huh? You've
got some skill.
choice_data_list: Why, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Heh, now you've got me motivated.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Amazing! That's the smile I wanted to see!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Great job, Trainer. How was your first modeling
experience?
choice_data_list: Nerve-racking.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? I think you did pretty well.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And City, you killed it, just as expected. It's like
you transformed the whole space with your
presence.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...You really are something else.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: That's exactly what I was going to say to you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What do you think we were talking about during
the shoot? It was you, Nature. The entire time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um... What do you mean?
choice_data_list: It just kind of ended up that way...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What?! All those smiles came from talking about
me?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That's so... embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I can see that. But, hey, it sure got me
motivated. I'm looking forward to competing with
you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Guess you could say we've got a special bond
now. Anyway, see you on the track.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh! Nooo!
choice_data_list: Looks like we've got another race to win!
Looks like we've got another race to win!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You have no idea how I feel...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But all right, I get it. I'll give it the good old
college try and try to shine in my own way.

Nice Nature seems more enthusiastic than usual
at training after that.
